commit.subject: LU-15748 tests: fix fallocate interop for older clients
commit.message:
LU-15748 tests: fix fallocate interop for older clients

For inter-op case. Where OSS is < 2.15.1
do not allow fsx to exercise fallocate calls

Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=sanityn env=ONLY=16,HONOR_EXCEPT=y
Test-Parameters: clientversion=2.14 testlist=sanityn env=ONLY=16
Test-Parameters: serverversion=2.14 testlist=sanityn env=ONLY=16,HONOR_EXCEPT=y
Test-Parameters: clientversion=2.14 testlist=sanity-dom env=ONLY=fsx
Test-Parameters: serverversion=2.14 testlist=sanity-dom env=ONLY=fsx
Test-Parameters: clientversion=2.14 testlist=sanity-benchmark env=ONLY=fsx
Test-Parameters: serverversion=2.14 testlist=sanity-benchmark env=ONLY=fsx
Fixes: 7905359296 ("LU-15748 osc: fallocate interop for 2.14 clients")
Signed-off-by: Arshad Hussain <arshad.hussain@aeoncomputing.com>
Change-Id: Iaa7bf1bb316715561a6b41636e456def3f56a50e
